reference: I have had pain in my pelvic area starting on the left side and going across the front of my body to my right side. I have not had this kind of pain before. I do know that around this time I also had urine with a foul odor and my urine looks like a faded or dull yellow color. I also have pain on my right side above my leg in my abdominal area. What can this be?
